senses.gloss: to be in disorder, to be in great confusion, to be in great commotion
to be agitated, to be confused, to be excited
to handle or deal with clumsily
to make out with, to get busy with, to cohabit
to agitate, to disrupt, to put into (more) commotion, to stir up, to get (someone) excited
to jest, to play around (by being silly or the like), to clown around, to play the fool, to behave in a silly or foolish way
verbal noun of هَرَجَ (haraja) (form I), commotion, tumult
